buildCommand: cd ../.. && echo '=== Building shared ===' && pnpm --filter @communityos/shared run build 2>&1 && echo '=== Building web ===' && cd apps/web && node -e "console.log('Node:', process.version)" && npx next build 2>&1
installCommand: cd ../.. && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.9 --activate && pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile
